resources.string: Please enter a query to search.
Couldn\u2019t fetch AI answer. Try again.
Add an API key in settings (AI Provider) to fetch AI answers.
Launch an app or refine your search to see suggestions.
No email app found to send mail.
We could not load your apps. Try again in a moment.
You can\u2019t uninstall Quick Search from here.
If you want to see your recently used apps in suggestions, grant usage access.
Tip: Press and hold any action here to customize it for individual contacts.
Contacts permission is required to perform contact search
Phone permission is required for this action
Google Meet call failed - app may not support this method
Cannot make Google Meet call - no phone number found
Failed to open Google Meet video call
Signal call failed. Please ensure Signal is installed.
Failed to open Signal video call
Telegram call failed. Please ensure Telegram is installed.
WhatsApp call failed. Please ensure WhatsApp is installed.
Failed to open WhatsApp video call
Cannot make WhatsApp video call - missing contact data
WhatsApp not available for video calls
Calendar permission is required to perform calendar search
Files permission is required to perform file search
You can disable search history in
Adding shortcuts to home screen is not supported on this device
Type this alias at the start or end of your query to quickly initiate search with %1$s.
Type this alias at the start of your query to quickly initiate search with %1$s.
Type this alias at the start of your query to trigger the %1$s search.
Type this alias at the start of your query to enter into %1$s mode.
Choose an image for \"%1$s\". This only changes how the shortcut appears in Quick Search.
You can change this anytime in Settings.
Review the number in your dialer before calling.
Place the call immediately (requires calling permission).
Update Amazon domain for your country.
Do you find this app useful?
Tell us what we can improve
Enter a nickname for "%1$s". You can search for it using this nickname.
This action requires %1$s permission. You will be taken to system settings to grant it.
Automatically close the app after result is opened
Unable to request the widget. Try again.
Direct widget pinning isn\'t supported on this Android version. Add it from your home screen widgets list.
Quick Search tile is already added
Unable to request the Quick Settings tile. Try again.
Direct tile requests aren\'t supported on this Android version. Use Quick Settings edit to add it.
View the complete list of features and capabilities
Some activities may not work as expected
Add a supported URL or intent link which opens a specific screen in the app. Unsupported links will be opened in your browser.
Add Custom Search Query Shortcut to %1$s
No app supports shortcut creation on this device.
Tap any app to view its shortcuts. Enable, disable, or add custom shortcuts.\n\nAvailable Shortcuts: %1$s
Wallpaper, search engine styles, one-handed mode, etc.
Launch voice typing when launched as digital assistant
Proceed at your own risk. Exported API key is not encrypted and can be accessed by anyone who has access to your backup file.
This will overwrite your existing settings.
Export or import your app settings
Place the search bar at the bottom of the screen
Create and add a new event
This event won\'t sync to your device calendar
Show today\'s events in home screen.
Include past events in search results.
Start a new note in the editor
Set this app as your default digital assistant app.
Change your default digital assistant app.
Place calls directly without opening the dialer.
Add an API key to enable AI-powered results within the app.
Gemini, OpenAI, Claude and Groq API keys are supported
Enables deeper reasoning for all AI calls. Uses more tokens.
Add any context you want AI to use when generating answers.
Web search is not available for this model.
Personal context is not available for this model.
Are you sure you want to clear all excluded items? This action cannot be undone.
View and manage items you have excluded
View this project\'s source code on GitHub
Leave a 5 star rating if you find this app useful
These paths will be ignored when searching
Enter one or more folder paths separated by commas. They will be converted to the internal pattern format.\n\nExample: /Downloads/Pictures
Only these paths will be searched for file & folder searches
You are about to add Quick Search widget to your home screen. Long press on the widget to access widget settings page that has many customization options.
Add Quick Search widget to your home screen.
Different ways to launch this app
Most relevant items appear at bottom for easy access
Manage which file types appear in results
%s is not installed on your device
Tip: Set this app as your digital assistant to open the overlay from anywhere.
Search bar opens as an overlay on top of other apps
Permissions this app needs to enable features
Add Quick Search to Quick Settings tiles.
App search is disabled, cannot refresh apps data
Contacts search is disabled, cannot refresh contacts data
Data is refreshed automatically. Use these buttons to force refresh manually.
Files search is disabled, cannot refresh files data
Triggers search engine when you add an alias at the end of the query. Aliases will always work at the start.
Always visible above the keyboard as a horizontal list
Shown as cards in the results area when searching
Manage result types, web suggestions, and search history
Tip: You can search for settings directly from the search bar.
At least one item must be enabled
Add an API key to enable AI-powered search
Configure your AI provider for AI-powered search and tools
Show app names in suggestions and results
Tint app icons to match your theme
Use your device\'s dynamic color palette as the app theme
Disabled while Material You theme is enabled
Calculator, Unit converter, Dictionary and more
Adding an API key enables more tools.
Here are some examples of things you can ask in the search bar
Describe what this tool does. This prompt guides the AI when the tool is triggered.
Allow the model to fetch up-to-date information from the web.
Enable deeper reasoning for complex tasks. Uses more tokens.
This note will be permanently deleted.
These notes will be permanently deleted.
Derive accent colors from background image
Couldn\u2019t fetch wallpaper with files permission. Should I try another method to fetch your wallpaper?
Voice typing isn’t available right now.
You can search for Apps, App Shortcuts, Contacts, Files, Folders & Device settings.
Not available when custom buttons are active.
Due to Android\'s limitations, you cannot trigger the assistant unless Google is set as the digital assistant app.
Required to search your calendar events.
Required to call your contacts directly without opening the dialer.
Required to search through your documents and other files.
If you later change your mind about %1$s permission, you can grant the permission from app settings.
These permissions unlock additional features. They are optional. Your data stays on your device.
Required to show your recently used apps in suggestions.
Enable search engines you need and reorder them as you like.
Import your Quick Search settings using a backup file that you have exported previously.
Could not read the backup file. Please try again.
Your settings have been imported. Tap below to start searching.
When you type your search query and tap on any of these search engines, it will trigger search within these apps. You can modify them by long pressing.
Show or hide suggested apps on the home screen
Grant usage access permission to see more appropriate suggestions
Turn app settings search on or off
Turn app shortcuts search on or off
Turn app search on or off
Turn calendar search on or off
Turn notes search on or off
Turn contacts search on or off
Turn device settings search on or off
Turn files search on or off
Automatically clear old query when the app launches
Automatically open keyboard when the app launches
Show your search history in the home screen.
Highlight the top result that can be opened with the keyboard.
Invalid or unrecognized date or time
Toggle date & time calculator on or off
Toggle unit converter on or off
Convert Currencies e.g. 100 USD to INR
Enter any place to get their local time
Requires an AI provider API key
Couldn’t resolve that time request. Try a city, country, timezone, or explicit time.
No results found. Try tapping a search engine below to search the web.
